title: pipeline-atoms v1 pipeline atom
description: A pipeline atom is a reusable, versioned unit of CI/CD behavior. Type determines granularity: stage (a named phase in a pipeline), step (a single command or action inside a stage), gate (a pass/fail checkpoint that controls forward progress), github (a complete GitHub Actions workflow file catalogued as an atom). Composable and runtime-agnostic.

type.description: stage — a named phase grouping steps (e.g. lint, test, build, deploy); step — a single executable action inside a stage; gate — a pass/fail checkpoint evaluated before pipeline proceeds; github — a complete GitHub Actions workflow file catalogued as a reusable atom.

id.description: Stable, human-readable identifier in kebab-case segments, e.g. 'ci/validate-stage'.

version.description: SemVer. Patch for command tweaks; minor for new optional fields; major for breaking interface changes.

engine.description: Target CI runtime. Examples: github-actions, cloudflare-pages, wrangler, generic-shell.

command.description: Shell command to execute (step type). Use environment variable references for secrets.

working_directory.description: Working directory relative to repo root. Defaults to repo root.

environment.description: Environment variable name → description or $VAR_NAME reference. Values MUST NOT contain literal secrets.

timeout_seconds.description: Hard timeout; pipeline fails if exceeded.

steps.description: Ordered list of step atom refs (stage type only).

condition.description: Gate evaluation expression. Platform-specific syntax, e.g. '${{ steps.test.outcome == "success" }}'.

on_failure.description: Behavior when a gate condition is not met.

superseded_by.description: ID of the atom that replaces this one when deprecated or retired.

trigger.description: GitHub Actions event(s) that fire this workflow. E.g. push, pull_request, tag, schedule, workflow_dispatch. Comma-separate multiple events.

trigger_filter.description: Constraint applied to the trigger, e.g. 'branches: [main]', 'tags: [v*]', 'paths: [infra/terraform/**]'.

jobs.description: Top-level job names defined in the workflow file (github type only).

uses_secrets.description: GitHub Actions secret names consumed by this workflow. Values MUST be secret name references, not literal values.
